bias_direction: Authoring a reconciliation DR is itself governance work of exactly the kind the 2026-07-14 anti-displacement freeze warns can crowd out the judgment-heavy core; framing an unreconciled-text state as a contradiction that 'must' be resolved lends it an urgency that could rationalize further governance churn. It also lets the author of the session's overview reclassify a self-diagnosed description error (having summarized superseded doctrine) as a repo-level issue, shifting attribution off the overview and onto the documents. (This DR was subsequently SUPERSEDED-BY the Option A execution DR; scope narrowed to the one rule that fired, per the repo's compliant attestation pattern and check 8.)
independent_reviewer_counterclaim: A reviewer could argue no DR is warranted: the evidence-architecture.md:4 precedence clause already makes tier-system.md §8 govern, so the divergence is inert until evidence-architecture.md is next edited, and opening a DR manufactures work the freeze forbids. The counter is narrow but real — assess_cell.py's v_best_practice still mechanically excludes regulatory-stratum-only cells, so code and §8 already disagree at render time; whether that matters before any such cell is actually rendered is itself the open question, which this DR routed to the owner rather than deciding. best-practice-synthesis-routing and evidence-verification-gate-for-synthesis were NOT exercised by this framing DR (no synthesis written, no source cited).
